ExportFeatures 淄博0810_sign_Merge E:\nky_sample\2024\2024_调研点\2024_sample.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "O_Name "O_Name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,淄博0810_sign_Merge,O_Name,0,100;O_Com "O_Com" true true false 4 Text 0 0,First,#,淄博0810_sign_Merge,O_Com,0,4;O_Lat "O_Lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,淄博0810_sign_Merge,O_Lat,-1,-1;O_Lng "O_Lng" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,淄博0810_sign_Merge,O_Lng,-1,-1;O_Alt "O_Alt" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,淄博0810_sign_Merge,O_Alt,-1,-1;O_TxtType "O_TxtType" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,淄博0810_sign_Merge,O_TxtType,-1,-1;O_Flag "O_Flag" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,淄博0810_sign_Merge,O_Flag,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures 2024_sample E:\nky_sample\2024\2024_调研点\2024_sample2.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "O_Name "O_Name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,2024_sample,O_Name,0,100;O_Com "O_Com" true true false 4 Text 0 0,First,#,2024_sample,O_Com,0,4;O_Lat "O_Lat" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,2024_sample,O_Lat,-1,-1;O_Lng "O_Lng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,2024_sample,O_Lng,-1,-1;O_Alt "O_Alt" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,2024_sample,O_Alt,-1,-1;O_TxtType "O_TxtType" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,2024_sample,O_TxtType,-1,-1;O_Flag "O_Flag" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,2024_sample,O_Flag,-1,-1" #

CalculateField 2024_sample2 O_Com SequentialNumber() "Python 3" "# 计算顺序编号 # 可访问 esriurl.com/CalculatorExamples 获取更多计算器示例 rec=0 def SequentialNumber(): global rec pStart = 1 pInterval = 1 if (rec == 0): rec = pStart else: rec = rec + pInterval return rec" 文本 NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField "2024_sample2 选择" O_Com SequentialNumber() "Python 3" "# 计算顺序编号 # 可访问 esriurl.com/CalculatorExamples 获取更多计算器示例 rec=0 def SequentialNumber(): global rec pStart = 1 pInterval = 1 if (rec == 0): rec = pStart else: rec = rec + pInterval return rec" 文本 NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField "2024_sample2 选择" O_Alt !FID!%5 "Python 3" "# 计算顺序编号 # 可访问 esriurl.com/CalculatorExamples 获取更多计算器示例 rec=0 def SequentialNumber(): global rec pStart = 1 pInterval = 1 if (rec == 0): rec = pStart else: rec = rec + pInterval return rec" 文本 NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField "2024_sample2 选择 选择" O_Com;O_Alt;O_TxtType;O_Flag 删除字段

ExportFeatures "2024_sample2 选择 选择" E:\nky_sample\2024\2024_调研点_整理\花生.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "O_Name "O_Name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,2024_sample2 选择 选择,O_Name,0,100;O_Lat "O_Lat" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,2024_sample2 选择 选择,O_Lat,-1,-1;O_Lng "O_Lng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,2024_sample2 选择 选择,O_Lng,-1,-1" #

Merge 花生;玉米;其他;大豆 C:\Users\CHL\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\MyProject1\MyProject1.gdb\花生_Merge "O_Name "O_Name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,花生,O_Name,0,100,玉米,O_Name,0,100,其他,O_Name,0,100,大豆,O_Name,0,100;O_Lat "O_Lat" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,花生,O_Lat,-1,-1,玉米,O_Lat,-1,-1,其他,O_Lat,-1,-1,大豆,O_Lat,-1,-1;O_Lng "O_Lng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,花生,O_Lng,-1,-1,玉米,O_Lng,-1,-1,其他,O_Lng,-1,-1,大豆,O_Lng,-1,-1" NO_SOURCE_INFO

ExportFeatures 花生_Merge E:\nky_sample\2024\2024_调研点_整理\新建文件夹\2024_调研点_整理.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "O_Name "O_Name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,花生_Merge,O_Name,0,100;O_Lat "O_Lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,花生_Merge,O_Lat,-1,-1;O_Lng "O_Lng" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,花生_Merge,O_Lng,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
